text:
FIFA World Cup, international association football competition contested by the senior men's national teams, also known as FIFA World Cup of Football, World Cup, FIFA Association Football World Cup, FIFA Football World Cup, Soccer World Cup, FWC, The World Cup, Football World Cup.
